title: Rusty's Sylvan
description: A simple and serene Worldgen mod, that overhauls a few vanilla biomes while adding its own biomes with a natural spin.
body:
![Sylvan](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/94c00b56a519988a7858ba797a24cda8c2b4851d.png)

> A mod by **Rusty_Pie**

![Mod Thumb [Redwood Forest with Karst coves' stone formations in front]](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3865ec8c281761c08a4afa28ac070e0cbbcb702e_0.webp)

<details>
<summary>New biomes [+ features]</summary>

  - Karst Coves
    - Stone Fromations 
      - Arches
      - Spires
<details>
<summary>images</summary>

![shores](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6a2bf8a8fbbd68bcdd230320d1a42a0627a02fc2_0.webp)

![next to warm biomes (jungles)](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/93e1aa3daa451d13e50b6037bb5ec4be9f097000_0.webp)

![in the ocean](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2cc273544d8b5bf0e0b1fcf538b40ddaba67751c_0.webp)

</details>


  - Redwood Forests
    - Redwood Sequoia Trees
<details>
<summary>images</summary>

![riverbank](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0768d56a30705dc981b14d5c04908b8fe07714ed_0.webp)

![canopies; very tall trees](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5e5660a00b589c7b30d01663b27ed1e16c613c1d_0.webp)

![clearing](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e0604a1ba8473953464a8df5062a41f56e5c2eee_0.webp)

![understory + view of forest floor](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5dde7d4db75aa786a124c2730830550f4fa5582b_0.webp)

</details>


  - Auracaria Groves
    - Auracaria Trees
<details>
<summary>Images</summary>

![floor](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/eff08b3fd6f27bed66c5d64cc95ee7d86da7c3d4_0.webp)

![trees](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1b1b21275dbf7a9cc4c3a64ff959d0a9477e8c19_0.webp)

![tree canopies](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2fcdd94fe2bc90fd6673c7852e4aa694555a4311_0.webp)

</details>



</details>

<details>
<summary>Vanilla Biome Overhauls</summary>

  - Beach
    - rocks
    - larger beaches
  - Badlands
    - short cylindrical terracotta protrusions / terracotta mounds
  - Stony Shores
    - Stone Fromations 
      - Arches
      - Spires
  - Ice Spikes + Frozen Ocean + Deep Frozen Ocean
    - New larger conical ice spikes which point in random directions

</details>

<details>
<summary>Woodsets + Sapling</summary>

  - Redwood [currently lacks doors, trapdoors, boats, signs & hanging signs]
  - Auracaria [currently lacks doors, trapdoors, boats, signs & hanging signs]

</details>
